issues.title: API lint blocked expected validation path
issues.resolution: Removed stale unused imports, fixed require-await on unavailable controllers, typed auth zod issue handling, and made JSON parsing explicit in run repositories.

issues.title: Active run restore/reopen path lacked regression coverage
issues.resolution: Added Mini App test proving local activeRunId renders a resume CTA only after backend confirms an active or awaiting-move run.

issues.title: Review stale question mismatch recovery lacked regression coverage
issues.resolution: Added Mini App test for review_question_mismatch refetch recovery.

issues.title: Launch bundle QA missed example completeness and stricter reference checks
issues.resolution: Extended Phase 11 launch QA with example completeness, approved reference coherence, linked option label matching, and high-risk duplicate Russian translation detection.

issues.title: Game balance lacked deterministic smoke coverage
issues.resolution: Added deterministic fixed-seed balance simulation covering move count, score, line clears, combos, and run-over distribution.

issues.title: Telegram dark theme variable application lacked regression coverage
issues.resolution: Added Mini App test for dark theme dataset and Telegram CSS custom properties.

issues.title: Soft-launch balance should be tuned with real user data
issues.resolution: No code change; deterministic simulation is launchable, but real first-session run length and answer cadence should be reviewed during Phase 15.
